calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-23-2021 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Aug-24-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Deepti Jain.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Adam Brumage, Esq. appeared for plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A.
Samira Peacock, Associate Vendor Management Analyst for plainitff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Mr. Brumage and Ms. Peacock appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Deepti Jain.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Common Counts was filed October 14, 2020, and personally served on defendant Deepti Jain on January 11, 2021.
Default as to defendant Deepti Jain was entered on April 1, 2021.
DOE defendants not named in plaintiff's complaint.

Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A. submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Account Statements.........................................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Electronic Record of Account Application...................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 3: Carholder Agreement adn Changes in Terms...................................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A., and against the defaulted defendant Deepti Jain, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $26,683.49.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - Waived.

Total - $26,683.49.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.
